sections.name: metadata
sections.message: Pack metadata can be parsed without copying source assets.

sections.name: textures
sections.message: Texture files can be referenced, but target node mappings need review.

sections.name: entities
sections.message: Entity descriptors can create placeholder stubs; behavior AI is not imported.

sections.name: behaviors
sections.message: Behavior scripts are reported but not executed or translated.

unsupported_features.message: Behavior scripts are not translated in dry-run compatibility reports.
unsupported_features.recommendation: Create a manual Luanti entity behavior or keep the entity as a static stub.

unsupported_features.message: Source entity AI goals do not have a Luanti mapping yet.
unsupported_features.recommendation: Map the entity to a first-party agent or a manually authored mob definition.

unsupported_features.message: The dry run references the asset but does not copy payload bytes.
unsupported_features.recommendation: Keep the asset in a user-owned fixture root and import only after rights are confirmed.

planned_actions.description: Map user-owned texture references to Luanti media names after manual review.
Create one placeholder entity definition without imported behavior AI.
Skip behavior scripts until a manual behavior mapping exists.

notes: Synthetic example only; no source payloads are committed.
An apply phase would queue bounded import tasks after operator review.
